title: 宝塚記念の後に・燃やす

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City gives it her all and wins the Takarazuka
Kinen against Tamamo Cross!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Tamamo Cross reveals she had
originally been looking forward to facing Gold
City, having been inspired by her fiery
determination.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But by the time the opportunity came, Gold City
had found herself in a slump, leaving Tamamo
Cross frustrated to see her rival so affected by
public opinion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now, however, Gold City's real fighting spirit has
returned. When she explains that she runs for the
sake of running itself, Tamamo Cross is finally
satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking forward, Gold City seeks a more grueling
challenge. She decides to run in the Japan Cup,
where the "Beast" Oguri Cap awaits.
